projects.recommendation: Approve the data platform architecture and proceed with vendor selection.
projects.decision: APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS - Project approved to proceed to Phase 1, subject to: security audit sign-off by the CISO and legal review of data residency requirements. Budget of GBP 150,000 confirmed.

projects.recommendation: Complete the proof of concept before committing to a full build; de-risk the approach.
projects.decision: DEFERRED - Decision deferred pending completion of the feasibility study and initial risk assessment. Team to strengthen the business case and re-present at the next steering committee.

projects.recommendation: Proceed to UAT; data accuracy metrics are consistently above the 90% threshold.
projects.decision: APPROVED - Phase 2 deliverables reviewed and approved to continue. Progress is on track and within budget. Revised budget of $48,000 approved following scope clarification.
action_items: Aisha Mahmood: Finalise dependency mapping with the platform team - Due: 27 September 2023
Carlos Mendez: Publish go/no-go recommendation to the steering committee - Due: 27 September 2023
Carlos Mendez: Review post-implementation review agenda - Due: 27 September 2023

projects.recommendation: Allocate two additional senior engineers to the critical path to recover the 2-week delay.
projects.decision: PILOT APPROVED - Phase 3 milestones met. Pilot approved for a single-tenant deployment for one key client. Full rollout contingent on pilot KPIs being met within 12 weeks. Budget of EUR 60,000 released for pilot phase.
